PotatoMaker third-party software notices
========================================

PotatoMaker itself is licensed under the MIT License. The following software is
distributed with the Windows application or can be downloaded separately at the
user's request, and remains subject to its own license.

FFMpegCore 5.4.0
----------------
Copyright (c) the FFMpegCore contributors.
License: MIT
Source: https://github.com/rosenbjerg/FFMpegCore/tree/ed8f899d04a1f71c481e02b2123176d5cd097a4a
License text: licenses/FFMpegCore-MIT.txt

FFmpeg (required external runtime)
----------------------------------
Copyright (c) 2000-2026 the FFmpeg developers.
License of the offered BtbN full GPL build: GNU General Public License version 3
or later.
Project: https://ffmpeg.org/
BtbN build project and source recipes: https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds
Offered archive: https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds/releases/download/autobuild-2026-06-30-13-34/ffmpeg-n8.1.2-21-gce3c09c101-win64-gpl-8.1.zip
Archive SHA-256: 682361e32c9631caec09e5d9f09077101c9ed90c14e275f62014fefa6d397990
License text: licenses/GPL-3.0.txt

FFmpeg is not included in PotatoMaker installers, packages, or release assets.
If the user accepts automatic setup, PotatoMaker downloads the archive directly
from BtbN, verifies the upstream SHA-256, validates required capabilities, and
extracts ffmpeg.exe and ffprobe.exe into that user's local application data.
PotatoMaker invokes those separate command-line programs and does not link
FFmpeg libraries into the application.

VLC / LibVLC (required external runtime)
----------------------------------------
Copyright (c) VideoLAN and VLC authors.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License version 2.1 or later; individual VLC
plugins and contributed libraries may use other licenses.
Project, downloads, and source: https://www.videolan.org/vlc/
Offered archive: https://download.videolan.org/pub/videolan/vlc/3.0.23/win64/vlc-3.0.23-win64.zip
Archive SHA-256: 992d19dbd0b8a7cde9167d2f7780b1ef6f92acc8a71acfa736101a21f35181e1
License texts: licenses/LGPL-2.1.txt and licenses/GPL-2.0.txt

Native LibVLC, LibVLCcore, codec plugins, and VLC installers are not included in
PotatoMaker installers, packages, or release assets. If the user accepts
first-run setup, PotatoMaker downloads the archive directly from VideoLAN,
verifies its SHA-256, validates the native runtime, and extracts the preview
runtime into that user's local application data.

LibVLCSharp and LibVLCSharp.Avalonia 3.9.6
-----------------------------------------
Copyright (c) the VideoLAN and LibVLCSharp contributors.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License version 2.1 or later.
Source: https://github.com/videolan/LibVLCSharp/tree/4badd9ff352cc0824a3eafd20c7e660a89bba879
Source archive: https://github.com/videolan/LibVLCSharp/archive/4badd9ff352cc0824a3eafd20c7e660a89bba879.zip
License texts: licenses/LGPL-2.1.txt and licenses/GPL-2.0.txt

No warranty
-----------
These components are provided without warranty, as described by their
respective licenses. License and source obligations for each component remain
with that component's copyright holders.
